name: Bizcom Electronics
message: Bizcom Electronics, Inc. is a service provider based in Milpitas, California, specializing in the repair, refurbishment, and reconfiguration of electronic devices and systems. Founded in 1992, it offers a range of services including board-level repair, supply chain management, and post-sale support tailored for original manufacturers. Committed to quality and customer satisfaction, Bizcom thrives on delivering innovative business models and responsive services to enhance clients' operations. Their mission is to be the go-to partner for businesses seeking efficient solutions in electronic service management and logistics.
